input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.2
            TITLE: cylinder certification - the gas cylinder/tank must be commercially manufactured, designed

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.2: Cylinder Certification - The gas cylinder/tank must be commercially manufactured, designed
T.6.1.2 Cylinder Certification - The gas cylinder/tank must be commercially manufactured, designed 
and built for the pressure being used, certified by an accredited testing laboratory in the 
country of its origin, and labeled or stamped appropriately.

final_answer: Cylinder Certification - The gas cylinder/tank must be commercially manufactured, designed and built for the pressure being used, certified by an accredited testing laboratory in the country of its origin, and labeled or stamped appropriately.
